events.title: Brian May turns 79
events.blurb: Legendary Queen guitarist Brian May, known for his iconic sound and songwriting, celebrates his 79th birthday.

angles.name: Guitar God
angles.copy: Celebrating the incredible Brian May on his 79th birthday! What's your favourite Queen guitar solo?

events.title: Mick Jagger turns 83
events.blurb: The iconic frontman of The Rolling Stones, Mick Jagger, celebrates his 83rd birthday.

angles.name: Still Rolling
angles.copy: 83 years young and still rocking! Happy birthday to the one and only Mick Jagger. What's your ultimate Stones track?

events.title: MTV launched 45 years ago
events.blurb: Music Television (MTV) launched on August 1, 1981, with The Buggles' 'Video Killed The Radio Star' as its first music video.

angles.name: Video Killed The Radio Star
angles.copy: 45 years ago today, MTV changed music forever with its very first video. Did 'Video Killed The Radio Star' really predict the future?

events.title: Woodstock Festival began 57 years ago
events.blurb: The legendary Woodstock Music and Art Fair, billed as '3 Days of Peace & Music,' began on August 15, 1969, in Bethel, New York.

angles.name: Peace & Music
angles.copy: 57 years since the iconic Woodstock Festival kicked off. What legendary performance from that weekend do you wish you'd seen live?

events.title: Anniversary of Elvis Presley's passing
events.blurb: Elvis Presley, the 'King of Rock and Roll,' passed away on August 16, 1977; he would have been 91 this year.

angles.name: Remembering The King
angles.copy: Remembering Elvis Presley, who left us 49 years ago today. His music and legend live on. What's your favourite Elvis track?

events.title: Chrissie Hynde turns 75
events.blurb: Chrissie Hynde, the American-British singer, songwriter, and founding member of The Pretenders, celebrates her 75th birthday.

angles.name: Pretenders Icon
angles.copy: Happy 75th birthday to the incredible Chrissie Hynde! A true rock icon, what's your favourite Pretenders hit?

events.title: Liam Gallagher turns 54
events.blurb: Oasis frontman Liam Gallagher, known for his distinctive vocal style and outspoken personality, celebrates his 54th birthday.

angles.name: Mad Fer It
angles.copy: Our kid turns 54 today! Happy birthday to the one and only Liam Gallagher. What's your favourite Oasis anthem?

events.title: Global James Bond Day
events.blurb: Global James Bond Day celebrates the release of the first Bond film, Dr. No, which premiered on this day in 1962.

angles.name: Shaken, Not Stirred
angles.copy: Happy Global James Bond Day! What's your favourite Bond film or iconic theme song? Licence to thrill us with your answers!

events.title: John Lennon would have been 86
events.blurb: Remembering The Beatles co-founder John Lennon, who would have celebrated his 86th birthday today.

angles.name: Imagine His Legacy
angles.copy: On what would have been his 86th birthday, we remember the legendary John Lennon. His music and message still resonate.

events.title: John Cleese turns 87
events.blurb: British comedy legend John Cleese, co-founder of Monty Python and star of Fawlty Towers, celebrates his 87th birthday.

angles.name: Comedy Genius
angles.copy: Sending a very happy 87th birthday to the brilliant John Cleese! From Python to Fawlty Towers, what's your favourite Cleese moment?
